zh.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾

zh.lifeSummary: 當Albreda Deincourt於大約1222年出生在英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼時，她的父親Oliver Deincourt28歲，母親Nichola Camville25歲。她於1252年與Peter de Rotherfield在英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1315年在英國越可爾摩利享年95歲。

zh-hans.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albreda Deincourt于大约1222年出生在英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼时，她的父亲Oliver Deincourt28岁，母亲Nichola Camville25岁。她于1252年与Peter de Rotherfield在英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1315年在英国越可爾摩利享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Albreda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Elfreda  , but now probably taken as a feminine equivalent of   Alfred .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Albreda Deincourt was born about 1222, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Oliver Deincourt, was 28 and her mother, Nichola Camville, was 25. She married Peter de Rotherfield in 1252, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1315, in Morley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albreda Deincourt est née environ 1222, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Oliver Deincourt, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Nichola Camville, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Peter de Rotherfield en 1252, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1315, à Morley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albreda Deincourt um 1222 in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Oliver Deincourt 28 und ihre Mutter Nichola Camville 25. Sie hat 1252 in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England Peter de Rotherfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1315 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Morley, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albreda Deincourt è nata il circa 1222 nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Oliver Deincourt, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Nichola Camville, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Peter de Rotherfield nel 1252, nel North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1315, nel Morley, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Albreda Deincourtが約1222年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーで生まれた時，父Oliver Deincourtは28歳，母Nichola Camvilleは25歳であった。1252年にイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルでPeter de Rotherfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1315年にイギリスヨークシュアイアモーリーで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Albreda Deincourt(이)가 대략 1222년 영국 링코실르 블랭니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Oliver Deincourt(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nichola Camville(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1252년 영국 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 Peter de Rotherfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1315년 영국 요르크실르 모를리에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1222–about 1315: tany ho any amin'ny 1222–tany ho any amin'ny 1315

mn.Blankney, Branston, Lincolnshire, Englan: Blankney, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albreda Deincourt nasceu aproximadamente 1222, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Oliver Deincourt, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Nichola Camville, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Peter de Rotherfield em 1252, em North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1315, em Morley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albreda Deincourt родилась около 1222 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Oliver Deincourt было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Nichola Camville, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter de Rotherfield в 1252 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1315 г. в местности морли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 95 лет.

sm.about 1222–about 1315: e tusa o le 1222–e tusa o le 1315

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Albreda Deincourt nació aproximadamente 1222, en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Oliver Deincourt, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Nichola Camville, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Peter de Rotherfield en 1252, en North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1315, en Morley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 95 años.
